calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up; Points And Authorities; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Daniel E. Hicks.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

David Stephen Zalob, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mary Salome, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Daniel E. Hicks.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 14, 2016.
Default was entered against defendant Daniel E. Hicks on August 21, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 3, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mary Salome, and against the Defaulted Defendant Daniel E. Hicks, as follows:

Damages - $762.50.
Total - $762.50.

Additionally, plaintiff Mary Salome is granted temporary access to defendant Daniel E. Hicks' property, located at 217 Elmira Street, San Francisco, CA, commencing at 8:00 a.m. until 5:00 p.m. from May 14, 2018 through May 18, 2018, inclusive, or within ten (10) days thereof due to weather delays, for the sole purpose of repairing the western wall of plaintiff's property. Plaintiff's access for such purpose shall be limited to the marked-out area set forth in the official surveyor's map reflecting the work site area attached to the judgment as exhibit 1.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up; Points And Authorities; Proposed Judgment
